_metadata.title: Lens Studio Deprecated API Replacements
_metadata.description: Comprehensive mapping of deprecated Lens Studio APIs to their modern replacements

classes.title: Deprecated Classes
classes.description: Deprecated class types and their replacements

items.Animation: [Replaced] Removed (entire Animation class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixer: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixerLayer: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixerLayer class no longer available, use AnimationAsset instead)
items.BlendShapes: [Replaced] Removed (entire BlendShapes class no longer available, use RenderMeshVisual.blendShapesEnabled instead)
items.ClearScreen: [Deprecated] Removed (entire ClearScreen class no longer available)
items.DepthSetter: [Deprecated] Removed (entire DepthSetter class no longer available)
items.FaceImagePickerTextureProvider: [Replaced] Removed (entire FaceImagePickerTextureProvider class no longer available, use MediaPickerTextureProvider instead)
items.FaceTextureProvider: [Replaced] Removed (entire FaceTextureProvider class no longer available, use MediaPickerTextureProvider instead)

items.IntStepNoLerpAnimationTrackKeyFramed: [Deprecated] Removed (entire IntStepNoLerpAnimationTrackKeyFramed class no longer available)
items.Label: [Replaced] Removed (entire Label class no longer available, use MaterialMeshVisual instead)
items.MeshVisual: [Deprecated] This class has been DEPRECATED starting in Lens Studio 2.3. Use BaseMeshVisual, MaterialMeshVisual, or RenderMeshVisual instead.

items.SpriteVisual: [Deprecated] Removed (entire SpriteVisual class no longer available)

items.Animation.getAnimationLayerByName: [Replaced] Removed (entire Animation class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.Animation.removeAnimationLayerByName: [Replaced] Removed (entire Animation class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.Animation.setAnimationLayerByName: [Replaced] Removed (entire Animation class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)

items.AnimationMixer.getAnimationLayerNames: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixer.getLayer: [Replaced] Use AnimationPlayer.getClip(name) or AnimationPlayer.clips - Get animation layer/clip by name from AnimationPlayer
items.AnimationMixer.getLayerTime: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixer.getLayers(): [Replaced] Use AnimationPlayer.clips - Get animation clips from AnimationPlayer instead of AnimationMixer
items.AnimationMixer.pause: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)

items.AnimationMixer.resume: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixer.setWeight: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixer.start: [Replaced] Use AnimationPlayer.playClipAt(name, time) - Start animation playback at specific time
items.AnimationMixer.startWithCallback: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)
items.AnimationMixer.stop: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixer class no longer available, use AnimationPlayer instead)

items.AnimationMixerLayer.stop: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixerLayer class no longer available, use AnimationAsset instead)

items.BlendShapes.hasBlendShape: [Replaced] Removed (entire BlendShapes class no longer available, use RenderMeshVisual.blendShapesEnabled instead)
items.BlendShapes.setBlendShape: [Replaced] Removed (entire BlendShapes class no longer available, use RenderMeshVisual.blendShapesEnabled instead)
items.DepthStencilRenderTarget.clearDepth: [Replaced] Use DepthStencilRenderTarget.clearDepthValue - Property renamed for clarity
items.FaceRenderObjectProvider.getExpressionNa: [Replaced] Use FaceRenderObjectProvider.onExpressionWeightsUpdate event - Event-based API for expression data: event1<NamedValues, void>

[Replaced] Use FaceRenderObjectProvider.onExpressionWeightsUpdate event - Event-based API for expression data: event1<NamedValues, void>

items.QuaternionAnimationTrackXYZEuler.setChil: [Deprecated] Removed (entire QuaternionAnimationTrackXYZEuler class no longer available)
items.RenderTargetProvider.clearColorEnabled: [Replaced] Use control.clearColorOption with ClearColorOption enum (e.g., ClearColorOption.CustomColor) - Property renamed, now uses enum values
items.SceneObject.getAllComponents: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.getComponents(componentType) - Method renamed to getComponents
items.SceneObject.getComponentByIndex: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.getComponents(componentType)[index] - Get component by index from array
items.SceneObject.getComponentCount: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.getComponents(componentType).length - Count components via array length
items.SceneObject.getFirstComponent: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.getComponent(componentType) - Method renamed to getComponent
items.SceneObject.getRenderLayer: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.layer - Direct property access instead of getter
items.SceneObject.setRenderLayer: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.layer - Direct property assignment instead of setter

items.Vec4AnimationTrackKeyFramed.removeKeyAt: [Deprecated] Removed (entire Vec4AnimationTrackKeyFramed class no longer available)
items.VideoTextureProvider.getStatus: [Replaced] Use VideoTextureProvider.status - Direct property access instead of getter
items.VideoTextureProvider.setOnReady: [Replaced] Use VideoTextureProvider.onPlaybackReady event - Event-based API: event0<void>
items.VoiceML.BaseNlpModel.addParam: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.BaseNlpModel class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.ListeningOptions.addSpeechContex: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.ListeningOptions class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs.getComm: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs.getInte: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs.getKeyw: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs.getQnaR: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.ListeningUpdateEventArgs class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.NlpKeywordModel.addKeywordGroup: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.NlpKeywordModel class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.enableSystemCommands: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.startListening: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.stopListening: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.addRenderLayer: [Replaced] Use LayerSet.add() or Camera.renderLayer - Render layer management moved to LayerSet and Camera components
items.checkRenderLayer: [Replaced] Use LayerSet.has() - Check render layer using LayerSet methods
items.createWebSocket: [Replaced] Use InternetModule.createWebSocket(url, protocols) - Moved from RemoteServiceModule to InternetModule
items.createWebView: [Replaced] Use InternetModule.createWebView(options, onSuccess, onFailure) - Moved from RemoteServiceModule to InternetModule
items.deleteStoredValue: [Replaced] Use PersistentStorageSystem.remove(key) - Global storage functions moved to PersistentStorageSystem
items.extractEulerXYZ: [Replaced] Use quat.toEulerAngles() or Transform.getWorldRotation() - Euler angle extraction available through quaternion methods
items.extractIndices: [Replaced] Use RenderMesh.indices or RenderMeshVisual API - Mesh data extraction through RenderMesh properties
items.extractVerticesForAttribute: [Replaced] Use RenderMesh.vertices or mesh attribute APIs - Vertex extraction through RenderMesh methods
items.fetch: [Replaced] Use InternetModule.fetch(request, options) - Global fetch moved to InternetModule
items.getAllRenderLayers: [Replaced] Use LayerSet API - Render layer management moved to LayerSet class
items.getCurrentPlayCount: [Replaced] Use AnimationPlayer.position or AnimationPlayer properties - Animation playback info through AnimationPlayer
items.getDevicePath: [Replaced] Use DeviceTracking component - Device tracking through component API
items.getDevicePathIndex: [Replaced] Use DeviceTracking component - Device tracking through component API
items.getFacesCount: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.isEnabledInHierarchy on the object containing the Head component - Official docs suggest checking if Head component's object is enabled in hierarchy instead of counting faces
items.getLandmarkCount: [Replaced] Use FaceRenderObjectProvider API - Face landmark data through FaceRenderObjectProvider
items.getLandmarks: [Replaced] Use FaceRenderObjectProvider API - Face landmarks through FaceRenderObjectProvider
items.getLayers: [Replaced] Use AnimationPlayer.clips - Access animation clips array
items.getMaskPercentage: [Replaced] Use FaceTracking.faceFound or FaceRenderObjectProvider - Face detection confidence through face tracking APIs
items.getStoredValue: [Replaced] Use PersistentStorageSystem.get(key) - Global storage functions moved to PersistentStorageSystem
items.hitTest: [Replaced] Use WorldTracking.hitTest() or WorldQueryModule.hitTest() - Hit testing through WorldTracking component or WorldQueryModule
items.listStoredValues: [Replaced] Use PersistentStorageSystem.keys() - Global storage functions moved to PersistentStorageSystem
items.removeRenderLayer: [Replaced] Use LayerSet.remove() - Render layer management moved to LayerSet class
items.sampleDepthAtPoint: [Replaced] Use DepthTexture or Camera.depthTexture - Depth sampling through depth texture APIs
items.setOnFinish: [Replaced] Use onFinish event property - Replace setOnFinish(callback) with onFinish.add(callback) for event-based callbacks
items.setStoredValue: [Replaced] Use PersistentStorageSystem.set(key, value) - Global storage functions moved to PersistentStorageSystem
items.ImagePickerTextureProvider.hideImagePick: [Replaced] Removed (entire ImagePickerTextureProvider class no longer available, use MediaPickerTextureProvider instead)
items.ImagePickerTextureProvider.showImagePick: [Replaced] Removed (entire ImagePickerTextureProvider class no longer available, use MediaPickerTextureProvider instead)
items.MotionController.Options.create: [Replaced] Use MotionController constructor or MotionController class methods - Options.create pattern deprecated
items.ProceduralTextureProvider.create: [Replaced] Use ProceduralTextureProvider.createWithFormat(width, height, TextureFormat) - Replace Colorspace with TextureFormat enum (R→R8Unorm, RG→RG8Unorm, RGBA→RGBA8Unorm, RGBAFloat→RGBA32Float, RGBAFloat16→RGBA16Float, RGFloat16→RG16Float)
items.VoiceML.ListeningOptions.create: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.ListeningOptions class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.NlpIntentsModelOptions.create: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.VoiceML.NlpKeywordModelOptions.create: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.VoiceML.QnaAction.create: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.QnaAction class no longer available)

items.AnimationMixerLayer.name: [Replaced] Use AnimationTrack.name - Access animation track name property

items.AnimationMixerLayer.rangeType: [Replaced] Removed (entire AnimationMixerLayer class no longer available, use AnimationAsset instead)

items.VoiceML.NlpKeywordResponse.keywords: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.NlpKeywordResponse class no longer available)

items.VoiceML.PostProcessingActionResponse.sta: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.PostProcessingActionResponse class no longer available)

items.VoiceML.SpeechContext.phrases: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.SpeechContext class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.onListeningDisabled: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.onListeningEnabled: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.onListeningError: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.onListeningUpdate: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceMLModule class no longer available)
items.asset: [Deprecated] Removed - Property type or context unclear, check class documentation for modern equivalent (likely renamed or moved to specific asset type properties)
items.blendShape: [Replaced] Use RenderMeshVisual.blendShapesEnabled or mesh.setBlendShapeWeight() - BlendShapes component deprecated
items.faceRect: [Replaced] Use FaceTracking.boundingBox or FaceRenderObjectProvider - Face bounds through modern face tracking APIs
items.fallbackHairMaterial: [Deprecated] Removed - Hair material properties restructured, check HairVisual documentation for current material properties
items.gaussianBlurSigma: [Deprecated] Removed - Blur parameters moved to material properties, check PostEffectVisual or Pass material properties
items.isEnabledInHiearchy: [Replaced] Use SceneObject.enabled with parent chain check - Hierarchy-aware enabled state through recursive parent checking
items.isPhysical: [Replaced] Use Physics.BodyComponent.dynamic - Physical properties through Physics component
items.lookupTexture: [Replaced] Use Pass.lookupTex or material texture properties - Lookup textures through Pass or material APIs
items.maskCoords: [Replaced] Use UV coordinates or texture coordinate properties - Mask coordinates through standard texture coordinate channels
items.maskTexture: [Replaced] Use Pass.maskTex or material texture slots - Mask textures through Pass or material APIs
items.mat4.fromEulerAnglesYXZ: [Replaced] Use quat.fromEulerAngles() then quat.toRotationMatrix() - Convert through quaternion for consistent results
items.mat4.fromYawPitchRoll: [Replaced] Use quat.fromEulerAngles() then quat.toRotationMatrix() - Use quaternion-based rotation for better gimbal lock handling
items.mixFactor: [Replaced] Use material blend properties or Pass blend settings - Mix/blend factors through material APIs
items.onMapped: [Replaced] Use LocationAsset events or callbacks - Location mapping events through LocationAsset API
items.preferedTriangle: [Replaced] Use RenderMesh triangle/face APIs - Triangle selection through mesh APIs (note: may be typo for 'preferred')
items.primaryHairMaterial: [Replaced] Removed - Hair material properties consolidated, use HairVisual.material for main material property
items.quat.quatFromEuler: [Replaced] Use quat.fromEulerAngle(x, y, z) - Method renamed from quatFromEuler to fromEulerAngle
items.textureCoords: [Replaced] Use RenderMesh UV attributes or mesh.vertices - Texture coordinates through mesh vertex attributes
items.textureFormat: [Replaced] Use Texture.getFormat() which returns TextureFormat enum - Property replaced by method returning modern TextureFormat
items.toEuler: [Replaced] Use quat.toEulerAngles() - Method renamed for clarity
items.track: [Deprecated] Removed (entire IntStepAnimationTrackKeyFramed class no longer available)
items.voicePace: [Deprecated] Removed (entire TextToSpeech module no longer available)
items.voiceStyle: [Deprecated] Removed (entire TextToSpeech module no longer available)
items.VoiceML.NlpResponseStatus.code: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.NlpResponseStatus class no longer available)
items.VoiceML.NlpResponseStatus.description: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.NlpResponseStatus class no longer available)

events.title: Deprecated Events
events.description: Deprecated event classes and their replacements

items.CandideUpdatedEvent: [Deprecated] Removed (entire CandideUpdatedEvent class no longer available)
items.CandideUpdatedEvent.points2d: [Deprecated] Removed (entire CandideUpdatedEvent class no longer available)
items.SnapcodeFoundEvent: [Deprecated] Removed (entire SnapcodeFoundEvent class no longer available)
items.TurnOnEvent: [Replaced] Removed (entire TurnOnEvent class no longer available, use OnStartEvent instead)

items.AddLegacy: [Replaced] Use BlendMode.Add (legacy version deprecated, use modern Add blend mode)
items.Colorspace: [Deprecated] Removed (Colorspace enum replaced by TextureFormat enum)
items.ERROR: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.Fill: [Replaced] Removed (TextureStretchMode enum no longer available, use Image component with ScreenTransform anchors instead)
items.Fit: [Replaced] Removed (TextureStretchMode enum no longer available, use Image component with ScreenTransform anchors instead)
items.FitHeight: [Replaced] Removed (TextureStretchMode enum no longer available, use Image component with ScreenTransform anchors instead)
items.FitWidth: [Replaced] Removed (TextureStretchMode enum no longer available, use Image component with ScreenTransform anchors instead)
items.MultiplyLegacy: [Replaced] Use BlendMode.Multiply (legacy version deprecated, use modern Multiply blend mode)
items.NOT_A_QUESTION: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.NO_ANSWER_FOUND: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.OK: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.R: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.R8Unorm (or R16Float/R32Float for higher precision)
items.R10G10B10A2_UINT: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGB10A2Uint (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase)
items.R10G10B10A2_UNORM: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGB10A2Unorm (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase)
items.R16G16B16A16_INT: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA16Sint (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase, INT→Sint)
items.R16G16B16A16_UINT: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA16Uint (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase)
items.R32G32B32A32_INT: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA32Sint (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase, INT→Sint)
items.R32G32B32A32_UINT: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA32Uint (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase)
items.R8G8B8A8_UNORM: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA8Unorm (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase)
items.R8G8_UNORM: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RG8Unorm (naming convention updated from underscore to CamelCase)
items.RG: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RG8Unorm (or RG16Float/RG32Float for higher precision)
items.RGBA: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA8Unorm (most common, or RGBA8Srgb for sRGB)
items.RGBAFloat: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RGBA32Float (unreleased feature, or RGBA16Float for half precision)
items.RGFloat: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.RG32Float (or RG16Float for half precision)
items.Red: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.R8Unorm (or R16Float/R32Float for higher precision)
items.RedFloat: [Replaced] Use TextureFormat.R32Float (or R16Float for half precision)
items.STATUS_OK: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.ScanModule.Contexts.Dogs: [Replaced] Removed (Dogs category no longer available, use ScanModule.Contexts.Objects or ScanModule.Contexts.Places instead)
items.Stretch: [Replaced] Removed (TextureStretchMode enum no longer available, use Image component with ScreenTransform anchors instead)
items.TextureStretchMode: [Deprecated] Removed (TextureStretchMode enum no longer available, SpriteVisual class removed)
items.UNSET: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.VoiceML.NlpResponseStatus: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML.NlpResponseStatus class no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.AnswerStatusCodes: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.NlpResponsesStatusCodes: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.VoiceMLModule.SpeechRecognizer.Default: [Deprecated] Removed (entire VoiceML module no longer available)
items.WeightedMode.Both: [Deprecated] Use WeightedMode.Easing, WeightedMode.Absolute, or WeightedMode.Slope instead - WeightedMode.Both is deprecated
items.WeightedMode.Left: [Deprecated] Use WeightedMode.Easing, WeightedMode.Absolute, or WeightedMode.Slope instead - WeightedMode.Left is deprecated
items.WeightedMode.None: [Deprecated] Use WeightedMode.Easing, WeightedMode.Absolute, or WeightedMode.Slope instead - WeightedMode.None is deprecated
items.WeightedMode.Right: [Deprecated] Use WeightedMode.Easing, WeightedMode.Absolute, or WeightedMode.Slope instead - WeightedMode.Right is deprecated
items.getColorspace: [Deprecated] Removed (getColorspace function no longer available, Colorspace enum removed)
